title: ‘Hamilton’ Actor Andrew Chappelle Makes Directorial Debut With Queer Erotic Short Starring Tony Nominee James Cusati-Moyer (EXCLUSIVE)
content:
The cast of the Juxtapose Studio film also includes Phillipa Soo, Johnny Sibilly, Michael Graceffa, Angus O’Brien, Brandon Black and Sara Lindsey.

ByMarc Malkin

Senior Editor, Culture and Events

“Hamilton” actorAndrew Chappellewill make his directorial debut with “I’m Gonna Kill You,” a queer erotic short starring Tony nominee James Cusati-Moyer.

The cast also includes Phillipa Soo (“Hamilton”), Johnny Sibilly (“Hacks”), Michael Graceffa (“Fantasmas,” “Death Becomes Her”), Angus O’Brien (“Boots”), Brandon Black (“Monster: The Jeffrey Dahmer Story”) and Sara Lindsey (“American Rust”).

Chappelle directs from his own script.

“Set in the distant future, ‘I’m Gonna Kill You,’ takes place inside an ‘all gay colony’ following the journey of Cal (Cusati-Moyer) and Spector (Graceffa), two paired lovers, fighting an internal battle – where remaining colony members ultimately pay the price of their twisted games,” the film’s official logline reads.

Sibilly, O’Brien and Black play a trio of friends spotlighted in the colony. Soo and Lindsay lend their voices to the short as Pairing Counselor and Cooper Clone, respectively.

Creative agency Juxtapose Studio leads the production with a $25,000 investment from Troye Sivan and Grindr’s Tap or Block campaign. The film also received a $5,000 production grant earned through the Pitch, Please! competition at the 2024 InsideOUT Toronto Film Festival. Google’s Kate Aitken serves as executive producer.

“A product of ideating during Covid-19, I was drawn to explore the idea of life in a smaller community, much like our shrunken networks during the peak of the pandemic,” Chappelle said. “My goal with this project is to thoughtfully expand the thriller genre within the queer cinema canon. I’m proud to have partnered with Juxtapose Studio to bring my vision to life with world-class actors. ‘I’m Gonna Kill You’ will arouse and petrify as it explores the destructive power of envy.”

Juxtapose Studio founding partner Luke Anderson said, “Juxtapose Studio was founded with an intention to invest its advertising returns in elevating queer, female, and POC storytelling. We find ourselves in a world where ‘diversity, equity and inclusion’ are now dirty words so it wasn’t especially easy to bring one of the first high-brow LGBTQ+ erotic thrillers to life … but if ‘Heated Rivalry’ can captivate the zeitgeist, we know Andrew’s stunning film deserves a seat at the table diversifying this ever-popular escapist genre.”

Chappelle made his screenplay debut with the 2023 Taran Killam-directed “Fanatic.” The comedy short earned the LGBTQ Audience Award at SCAD. Chappelle, who currently co-hosts the GLAAD-nominated podcast “Tactful Pettiness” with Cody Rigsby, is repped by Cornerstone Talent Agency.

Cusati-Moyer is repped by Untitled Entertainment and Goldman, Genow, Schenkman, Smelkinson & Christopher.  Graceffa is repped by TMT Entertainment Group and Bella Agency.

Sibilly is repped by Innovative Artists, Authentic Management, Paul Desisto Talent Management and Felker Toczek Suddleson McGinnis Ryann LLP.

O’Brien is repped by Paradigm Talent Agency.

Black is repped by Michael Greene Artists Agency, Slash Management, Sutton, Barth & Vennari, and Arise Artists Agency.

Soo is repped by UTA, Anonymous Content and Jackoway Austen Tyerman Wertheimer Mandelbaum Morris Bernstein Trattner Auerbach Hynick Jaime LeVine Sample & Klein. Lindsey is managed by Patrick Corcoran at PCM International.

Check out the trailer for “I’m Gonna Kill You” below.
title_zh: 《漢密爾頓》(Hamilton) 演員安德魯·查佩爾(Andrew Chappelle)以一部以同性戀為主題的情色短片首次執導，該片主演為托尼獎提名者詹姆斯·庫薩提-莫耶(James Cusati-Moyer)（獨家報導）。
content_zh:
喬克斯塔波斯(Juxtapose Studio)的電影演員陣容還包括菲莉帕·蘇(Phillipa Soo)、約翰尼·西比利(Johnny Sibilly)、邁克爾·格雷塞法(Michael Graceffa)、安格斯·奧布萊恩(Angus O’Brien)、布蘭登·布萊克(Brandon Black)和薩拉·林賽(Sara Lindsey)。

撰稿：馬克·馬爾金(Marc Malkin)

資深編輯，文化與活動

《漢密爾頓》(Hamilton)的演員安德魯·查佩爾(Andrew Chappelle)將以《我要殺了你》(I’m Gonna Kill You)這部短片首次執導，該片是一部以同性戀為主題的情色短片，主演為托尼獎提名者詹姆斯·庫薩提·莫耶(James Cusati-Moyer)。

演員陣容還包括菲莉帕·蘇、《駭客》(Hacks)的約翰尼·西比利、邁克爾·格雷塞法(《幽靈》(Fantasmas)、《她的死》(Death Becomes Her))、安格斯·奧布萊恩(《靴子》(Boots))、布蘭登·布萊克(《怪物：傑佛瑞·達默的故事》(Monster: The Jeffrey Dahmer Story))和薩拉·林賽(《美國銹》(American Rust))。

查佩爾將根據自己的劇本執導。

官方劇情簡介寫道：“故事設定在遙遠的未來，《我要殺了你》發生在一個‘全同性戀殖民地’內，講述了卡爾(Cusati-Moyer)和斯佩克托(Graceffa)這對情侶的旅程，他們在內心的鬥爭中掙扎——殖民地的其他成員最終為他們扭曲的遊戲付出了代價。”

西比利、奧布萊恩和布萊克飾演殖民地中的三位朋友。蘇和林賽則分別為短片中的配對顧問和庫珀克隆提供配音。

創意機構喬克斯塔波斯(Juxtapose Studio)主導製作，並獲得來自特洛伊·西萬(Troye Sivan)和Grindr的“Tap or Block”活動的25,000美元投資。該片還通過2024年InsideOUT多倫多電影節的Pitch, Please!比賽獲得了5,000美元的製作補助金。谷歌的凱特·艾特肯(Kate Aitken)擔任執行製片人。

查佩爾表示：“這是一個在Covid-19期間構思的產品，我被吸引去探索小型社區生活的想法，就像在疫情高峰期我們縮小的社交網絡一樣。我的目標是有意識地擴展酷兒電影範疇內的驚悚類型。我很自豪能與喬克斯塔波斯合作，讓我的視野與世界級演員一起實現。《我要殺了你》將在探索嫉妒的破壞性力量的同時，引起觀眾的興奮與恐懼。”

喬克斯塔波斯的創始合夥人盧克·安德森(Luke Anderson)表示：“喬克斯塔波斯成立的初衷是將廣告收益投資於提升酷兒、女性和有色人種的故事。我們身處一個‘多樣性、公平和包容’現在成為髒話的世界，因此將其中一部首屈一指的高端LGBTQ+情色驚悚片帶入現實並不特別容易……但如果《激烈的競爭》(Heated Rivalry)能夠吸引時代的共鳴，我們知道安德魯的驚人電影理應在這個日益受歡迎的逃避類型中佔有一席之地。”

查佩爾的劇本首次亮相於2023年塔蘭·基拉姆(Taran Killam)執導的《狂熱者》(Fanatic)。該喜劇短片在SCAD獲得了LGBTQ觀眾獎。查佩爾目前與科迪·瑞格斯比(Cody Rigsby)共同主持GLAAD提名的播客《得體的惡意》(Tactful Pettiness)，由Cornerstone Talent Agency代理。

庫薩提·莫耶由Untitled Entertainment和Goldman, Genow, Schenkman, Smelkinson & Christopher代理。格雷塞法由TMT Entertainment Group和Bella Agency代理。

西比利(Sibilly)由創新藝術(Innovative Artists)、真實管理(Authentic Management)、保羅·德西斯托人才管理(Paul Desisto Talent Management)和費爾克·托茲克·薩德爾森·麥金尼斯·瑞安律師事務所(Felker Toczek Suddleson McGinnis Ryann LLP)代理。

奧布賴恩(O’Brien)由範式人才經紀公司(Paradigm Talent Agency)代理。

布萊克(Black)由邁克爾·格林藝術代理公司(Michael Greene Artists Agency)、斯拉什管理(Slash Management)、薩頓、巴斯和維納里(Sutton, Barth & Vennari)以及阿賴斯藝術代理公司(Arise Artists Agency)代理。

蘇(Soo)由UTA、匿名內容(Anonymous Content)和傑克威·奧斯頓·泰爾曼·維特海默·曼德爾鮑姆·莫里斯·伯恩斯坦·特拉特納·奧爾巴赫·海尼克·傑米·勒維恩·桑普爾和克萊因(Jackoway Austen Tyerman Wertheimer Mandelbaum Morris Bernstein Trattner Auerbach Hynick Jaime LeVine Sample & Klein)代理。林賽(Lindsey)由帕特里克·科爾科蘭(Patrick Corcoran)在PCM國際管理。

請查看下面的《我要殺了你》(I’m Gonna Kill You)預告片。
summary_zh: 喬克斯塔波斯(Juxtapose Studio)的電影演員陣容還包括菲莉帕·蘇(Phillipa Soo)、約翰尼·西比利(Johnny Sibilly)、邁克爾·格雷塞法(Michael Graceffa)、安格斯·奧布萊恩(Angus O’Brien)、布蘭登·布萊克(Brandon Black)和薩拉·林賽(Sara Lindsey)。
